official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the block_entity_data packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, decoding, and writing the block_entity_data body without an initialized BlockEntity/Level.
Official binary source for the position, block entity type registry id, and trusted compound tag body shape.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound block_entity_data frame.

field_notes.fixture: Uses the official private constructor and STREAM_CODEC with a context-free BlockPos value, built-in BlockEntityType.CHEST, and an empty CompoundTag. It requires bootstrapped built-in registries for the registry codec but no initialized Level, BlockEntity, or game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound block_entity_data packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official BlockPos, built-in chest block entity type, and empty CompoundTag fixture only; do not infer block entity semantics, NBT schema, world/chunk state, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
